calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment By Court ?Prove-Up? Against Defendant Prezi Inc.
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for judgment by default against Defendant Prezi Inc.

Dept: 505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes: Proceedings recorded by "for the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:15:26 a.m., pausing at 9:23:6 a.m., resuming at 9:46:45 a.m. and concluding at 10:03:33 a.m.(D505)

Carlos Jato, Esq. representing Plaintiff Paloma Benito Diez.
Plaintiff Paloma Benito Diez was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's complaint for recognition of foreign money judgments filed Jan-12-2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant on Feb-04-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on Mar-07-2023.
Dismissal filed as to Does 1-60 inclusive on Feb-09-2024.

Counsel to summarize the facts of the case, offer of proof as to witness testimony and lay foundation for prayer in the complaint.
Counsel to discuss the conversion of the judgment amount into US dollars.
Counsel to cite CCP683.110 as legal reference as to the compounding of interest.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: True and correct English language translation of the Judgment written in the Spanish Language.
Exhibit B: Declaration of Paloma Benito
Exhibit C: complaint and summons

The Court examines plaintiff.

Plaintiff testifies that statements and declarations made are true and correct.

The Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover the following from the defendant:
Damages $67,558.41
Interest $18,953.37
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $495.00

Total Judgment $87,006.78

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.
